productionIndexPolicy: Exclude this registry and all source-specific signatures from production retrieval contexts.

fingerprints.definition: Reject an instance whose route graph remains readily attributable to a single source room or dungeon sequence.
Reject an instance that preserves source-specific objects in the same ordered action sequence with equivalent feedback.
Reject an instance that preserves a recognizable source boss weakness, phase order, timing, or staging signature.
Reject proprietary names, characters, lore, dialogue, symbols, music, UI composition, or item silhouettes.
A reviewer without provenance should not reliably identify one source encounter after abstraction and transformation.
